currentRole.title: Senior Full Stack Engineer — AI Systems Integration
currentRole.summary: Works on Dekaflow 2, a next-generation cloud-based enterprise platform supporting large-scale operational workflows. Leads AI-assisted engineering initiatives with a focus on behavioral reliability, drift detection, prompt standards, and safe adoption of LLM tools across engineering teams.

roles.title: Senior Full Stack Engineer — AI Systems Integration
responsibilities: Leading early-stage AI agent R&D initiatives exploring agentic workflows for internal business processes, including data understanding and document retrieval use cases
Tech lead and people lead for a team of front-end engineers building Dekaflow 2.0, a next-generation enterprise platform supporting large-scale operational and grid-related workflows
Designed and delivered a recurring AI-assisted development training program, building organizational fluency around structured prompting, responsible usage patterns, and LLM failure modes
Led enterprise-wide GitHub Copilot deployment, establishing usage standards, behavioral guardrails, and governance practices enabling safe AI adoption across multiple engineering teams
Designed behavior-constrained AI workflows for internal tools, reducing hallucination-related defects in production-critical systems
Built evaluation and monitoring pipelines to detect LLM behavioral regressions before model or prompt updates reached production
Conducted behavioral incident triage for AI-assisted systems, diagnosing failure modes including intention drift, unsafe outputs, and requirement misalignment
Translated abstract AI risk, safety, and compliance requirements into deployable, auditable system designs

roles.title: Head React Native Developer & Co-Founder
responsibilities: Co-founded and led engineering for a social platform focused on safety and predictable interaction patterns
Architected and built a cross-platform mobile app using React Native and Expo
Designed Supabase-backed data models for users, events, chat, and attendance
Developed moderation and safety tooling, including prompt-driven content classification helpers
Managed App Store and Play Store releases with emphasis on trust and accessibility

roles.title: Senior Full Stack Developer — LLM-Integrated Systems
responsibilities: Designed and delivered AI-powered analytics and workflow tools integrated into internal business systems, supporting real business decision-making through LLM-generated insights in day-to-day operations

Built an agentic customer service tool that combined customer-submitted context with rep-authored input to research against an internal knowledge base and generate complete, ready-to-send response emails — including recipient routing, CC recommendations, and delivery destination

Implemented rule-based priority classification on incoming customer service requests, automatically escalating and routing emergency-tier messages to the appropriate internal teams without requiring manual triage
Authored structured meta-prompts supporting classification, summarization, and predictive UX behaviors, with a focus on consistency, interpretability, and safe output boundaries
Ran controlled prompt experiments and A/B evaluations to analyze token sensitivity, edge-case behavior, and regression risks across evolving model versions prior to production rollout
Built data ingestion, caching, and retrieval pipelines (PostgreSQL, Redis) to supply LLM systems with structured, validated inputs suitable for production use
Developed internal prompting standards and documentation, guiding engineers on responsible usage patterns, known model limitations, and common failure modes
Integrated AI-driven features into React and Python-based applications, ensuring smooth end-to-end behavior from backend logic through user-facing interfaces

roles.title: Front-End Engineer (Contract)
responsibilities: Conducted full WCAG/ADA audit and remediation
Migrated site to a maintainable Wix platform
Improved UX clarity, semantic structure, and device compatibility
Trained staff on accessibility-informed workflows

roles.title: Full Stack Engineer — ML-Enhanced IoT Systems
responsibilities: Built real-time IoT monitoring dashboards translating diagnostic sensor data into actionable insights
Developed React-based web interfaces and backend services using Python, Java, and WebSockets
Integrated traditional machine learning models for anomaly detection and classification
Designed evaluation pipelines measuring model accuracy, false positives, and telemetry drift
Collaborated with product, firmware, and operations teams to ensure ML outputs were interpretable and operationally useful

roles.title: Front-End Web Developer
responsibilities: Modernized frontend templates
Consolidated fragmented email systems
Improved mobile UX and accessibility
Reduced workflow risks through clearer structure

roles.title: Front-End Developer — Interactive & Emerging Tech
responsibilities: Built responsive interfaces using React, Next.js, WordPress, Shopify, PHP, and SCSS
Developed UI components for early AR prototypes
Explored foundational ML and computer-vision concepts

roles.title: Front-End Developer (Freelance)
responsibilities: Built accessible websites and web applications for nonprofits, authors, and small businesses
Delivered responsive solutions using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, and WordPress
Ensured performance, maintainability, and cross-device compatibility

coreStrengths: AI behavior reliability and prompt governance
Applied AI system design and evaluation
Clear documentation, mentorship, and cross-team enablement

locationFlexibility.notes: Open to hybrid or in-person roles in major tech hubs.
